import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n == 0
      print("")
    else
      let category = if n <= 3
        "short"
      else if n <= 7
        "medium"
      else
        "long"
      end
      print("#{line} -> #{category}")
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
